title: Manufacturing Engineer - Finolex Industries - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Finolex Industries - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Finolex Industries has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Finolex Industries:
Finolex Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Industries!
